caption: A news broadcast features a man speaking into a microphone with an "ANI" logo. He is wearing a dark shirt and a checkered shawl draped over his shoulders. The setting is outdoors during the day, with other people visible in the background. The screen is filled with news graphics. A red header at the top reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". A red ticker at the bottom states "नड्डा: I.N.D.I. गठबंधन में भ्रष्टाचारी जुटे", followed by the "NEWS18 बिहार" logo and a timestamp of "10:06 PM". To the left, a small inset shows a man and the text "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". To the right, there are small insets of other men labeled as "मंत्री", specifically "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी". As the scene progresses, the man continues speaking, and the inset on the far right changes to show different individuals, including "रांगेद यादव" and "पवन कुमार".
